roadmap.title: Learn the loop and clear the early milestones
roadmap.description: Complete four Dam Battlegrounds rounds to open the Practice Range, test four weapons there, install and upgrade a Workshop station, and let the early looting, ARC, PvP, and level milestones unlock naturally.

roadmap.title: Expand the maps, equipment, and social checklist
roadmap.description: Extract from the three starter maps, use keys and special exits, upgrade weapons and stations, and complete the moderate combat, movement, extraction, and encountered-Raider tasks whenever their setup appears.

roadmap.title: Run the deliberate challenge setups
roadmap.description: Use disposable loadouts or cooperative players for the timer, downed-state, status-effect, Rocketeer, Queen, Snitch Scanner, and squad-separation achievements. Keep valuable gear out of attempts that intentionally end in a knockout.

roadmap.title: Finish the cumulative grind
roadmap.description: Continue extracting loot and opening containers while working toward 100 successful returns, level 75, five level-3 stations, 100 ARC destructions, 10 Raider knockouts, and 10 squadmate revives. Reach level 75 before the current Expedition departs on July 21, 2026 at 10:00 CEST / 08:00 UTC / 01:00 PT.

achievements.description: Search 50 loot containers.
achievements.summary: Search 50 @item{loot containers} across any number of raids.

guide.context: Previously opened containers still provide scavenging XP when checked, but the achievement counter is completed by ordinary container searches during live raids.

steps.text: Open searchable bins, cases, drawers, and other loot containers on every map until the cumulative counter reaches 50.

achievements.description: Safely return from Dam Battlegrounds, Buried City and Spaceport.
achievements.summary: Earn one safe return on each required map: @loc{Dam Battlegrounds}, @loc{Buried City}, and @loc{Spaceport}.

guide.context: Dam Battlegrounds is available first; the cited route places the other two starter-map unlocks after 6 and 12 completed matches.

steps.text: Select each of the three required maps when available, reach any standard return point or @loc{Raider Hatch}, and complete a safe return to @loc{Speranza} on all three.

achievements.description: Return to Speranza with 50 000 worth of loot.
achievements.summary: Return to @loc{Speranza} with at least 50,000 more loot value than the loadout carried into the raid.

guide.context: The inventory screen displays carried value near weight. Only the net value acquired topside matters, so a low-value starting kit and a high-capacity augment reduce the target you must gather.

steps.text: Loot high-value trinkets, weapons, and several 2,000–3,000-value items until the inventory value exceeds the starting loadout by 50,000, then complete a safe extraction.

achievements.description: Destroy 3 ARC enemies with a single Wolfpack grenade.
achievements.summary: Make one @item{Wolfpack grenade} eliminate a group of 3 or more @enemy{ARC enemies}.

guide.context: A Wolfpack releases 12 homing missiles that select ARC targets, so several light flying units are safer than three armored machines.

steps.text: Trigger a @enemy{Snitch} reinforcement call or throw a @item{Snitch Scanner} to assemble at least three nearby drones.
Throw one @item{Wolfpack grenade} above the clustered drones and let that single grenade destroy at least three of them.

achievements.description: Destroy a Snitch with a Stitcher.
achievements.summary: Use a @item{Stitcher} to deal the killing damage to a @enemy{Snitch}.

guide.context: A Snitch is the small flying ARC with a rotating searchlight; its light turns red when it detects a Raider and begins calling reinforcements.

steps.text: Equip the starter @item{Stitcher}, find a patrolling @enemy{Snitch}, and keep firing into its center until the weapon destroys it.

achievements.description: Safely return to Speranza 100 times.
achievements.summary: Complete 100 safe returns from raids to @loc{Speranza}.

guide.context: Both standard return points and Raider Hatches contribute. A downed extraction also counts when the downed Raider reaches Speranza before being knocked out.

steps.text: Prioritize survival and complete a valid extraction whenever a raid objective is finished until 100 successful returns have registered.

achievements.description: Safely return to Speranza for the first time.
achievements.summary: Reach a return point and extract safely to @loc{Speranza} for the first time.

guide.context: The unlock requires a completed return, so reaching an exit without surviving its departure sequence is not enough.

steps.text: In any raid, activate a return point, remain in its safe departure area, and leave before being fully knocked out.

achievements.description: Safely return to Speranza through a Raider Hatch.
achievements.estTime: one round after obtaining a Raider Hatch Key
achievements.summary: Use a @item{Raider Hatch Key} to extract safely through a @loc{Raider Hatch}.

guide.context: Hatches are marked by a circle with a downward arrow. Keys can be bought from @npc{Shani} or crafted after the @loc{Utility Station} reaches level 2.

steps.text: Carry a @item{Raider Hatch Key} into a raid and travel to a hatch marker.
Use the key at the hatch terminal, then interact with the opened hatch to return to @loc{Speranza}.

achievements.description: Visit a locked room on Dam Battlegrounds, Buried City or Spaceport.
achievements.estTime: one round after obtaining a matching key
achievements.summary: Enter one secured room; eligible maps are @loc{Spaceport}, @loc{Dam Battlegrounds}, and @loc{Buried City}.

guide.context: Room keys name the building they open and the matching doors show a red lock light. Credit also registers when another Raider opened the room first.

steps.text: Extract with a key for one of the three required maps, keep it in a safe pocket on the next raid, and locate its named building.
Unlock the matching red-lit door and cross into the room, or enter the same room after another Raider has opened it.

achievements.description: Reach a total lifetime loot value of 1 000 000.
achievements.summary: Extract a cumulative 1,000,000 value of loot collected during raids.

guide.context: The lifetime total excludes gear carried into a round and grows only from acquired loot brought safely back to Speranza.

steps.text: Fill available inventory space with valuable topside items and extract them safely until the cumulative extracted-loot value reaches 1,000,000.

achievements.description: Upgrade a weapon to Tier IV.
achievements.summary: Personally upgrade any weapon to @item{Tier IV} at the @loc{Gunsmith}.

guide.context: Looting, buying, or receiving a Tier IV weapon skips the required upgrade action; starting from Tier III minimizes the materials needed.

steps.text: Select a Tier III weapon in the @loc{Gunsmith} upgrade menu, gather every material listed for its next tier, and confirm the upgrade to Tier IV.

achievements.description: Have two weapons of Tier II or higher equipped in a round.
achievements.estTime: one round after acquiring two Tier II weapons
achievements.summary: Have two @item{Tier II-or-higher weapons} equipped during the same raid.

guide.context: The weapons may be upgraded beforehand or found topside; both equipped weapon slots must qualify at the same time.

steps.text: Equip two weapons marked Tier II, Tier III, or Tier IV before deploying, then enter any raid with both still in the weapon slots.

achievements.description: Revive a squadmate ten times.
achievements.summary: Revive downed squadmates 10 times across any number of raids.

guide.context: A normal held revive and an instant @item{Defibrillator} revive both count; the target must belong to the current squad.

steps.text: When a squadmate is downed but not fully knocked out, complete the revive interaction and continue until 10 squadmate revives have registered.

achievements.description: Reach level 75.
achievements.summary: Earn enough XP to reach Raider level 75 before any @warn{Expedition Departure} resets Raider level.

guide.context: Current Store Update 1.37.0 warns that completing the 100,000-damage Deal Damage challenge can unintentionally enroll a Raider for Departure. Every enrolled Raider departs automatically on July 21, 2026 at 10:00 CEST / 08:00 UTC / 01:00 PT, so check enrollment status and finish level 75 first.

steps.text: Open containers, interact with Raider remains, damage or destroy ARC, survive raids, and extract whenever possible to maximize XP.
Continue until level 75 unlocks, and verify the achievement before July 21, 2026 at 10:00 CEST / 08:00 UTC / 01:00 PT.

achievements.description: Have five stations upgraded to level 3 or higher.
achievements.summary: Upgrade 5 different @loc{Workshop stations} to level 3 or higher.

guide.context: The six eligible choices are the Medical Lab, Utility Station, Refiner, Explosives Station, Gear Bench, and Gunsmith; one may remain below level 3.

steps.text: Choose five stations and pin or track every level-2 and level-3 material requirement in their upgrade menus.
Extract the listed components, including high-tier ARC parts where requested, and complete level 3 on all five selected stations.

achievements.description: Install a station in your Workshop.
achievements.summary: Construct any new @loc{Workshop station} beyond the starting Workbench.

guide.context: Stations unlock specialized crafting; their construction screens identify the basic materials still missing.

steps.text: Open the Workshop, select an available station such as the @loc{Gunsmith}, gather the displayed materials during raids, and confirm its installation.

achievements.description: Reach level 10.
achievements.summary: Accumulate XP from raids until the Raider reaches level 10.

guide.context: Looting, combat, survival time, and successful returns all award XP, so no separate challenge route is required.

steps.text: Complete ordinary raid activities and safe extractions until the post-raid level reaches 10.

achievements.description: Upgrade a Workshop station to level 2.
achievements.summary: Upgrade any eligible @loc{Workshop station} to level 2.

guide.context: The starting Workbench is not an upgrade target; installed specialist stations display their own next-level material lists.

steps.text: Select an installed station, extract each material shown under its level-2 upgrade, and confirm the upgrade in the Workshop.

achievements.description: Set off two car alarms in a single round.
achievements.summary: Trigger the alarms on 2 different cars during one raid.

guide.context: Alarm-capable cars are identifiable by illuminated front and rear lights, and their sound can attract ARC and other Raiders.

steps.text: Approach one illuminated car closely enough to start its alarm, then locate and trigger a second illuminated car before leaving the same raid.

achievements.description: Safely return to Speranza with less than 5 seconds left in the round.
achievements.summary: Complete a safe extraction with fewer than 5 seconds left on the round timer.

guide.context: A Raider Hatch gives precise control because it can be opened early and used instantly at the desired time; carry disposable gear in case the timing fails.

steps.text: Open a @loc{Raider Hatch} near the end of a raid and wait beside the usable hatch.
When the visible round timer falls below 5 seconds, interact with the hatch and complete the return to @loc{Speranza}.

achievements.description: Safely return to Speranza while downed.
achievements.summary: Return safely to @loc{Speranza} while the Raider is downed but not knocked out.

guide.context: Downed Raiders can still operate a return terminal, and extraction succeeds if the downed-health timer lasts through departure.

steps.text: Bring a damaging grenade and activate a return point while standing inside its departure zone.
Shortly before departure, use the grenade to enter the downed state, remain inside the zone, and survive until the extraction finishes.

achievements.description: Have 4 weapon mods on a single weapon.
achievements.summary: Equip 4 compatible @item{weapon mods} on one weapon at the same time.

guide.context: Not every weapon has four mod slots, and each slot accepts only specific mod categories.

steps.text: Choose a weapon with four available slots, then loot, buy, or craft one compatible mod for every slot.
In the @loc{Speranza} inventory, install all four mods on that weapon simultaneously.

achievements.description: Hit a target over 250 meters away.
achievements.summary: Damage any @enemy{ARC enemy} or opposing Raider from more than 250 meters away.

guide.context: Only one damaging hit is required, so a stationary or large ARC target is safer than attempting the shot against a distant player.

steps.text: From an elevated open sightline, ping a distant target and confirm that the marker reads more than 250 meters.
Fire a suitable long-range weapon and land at least one hit that deals damage.

achievements.description: Be topside when the safe window closes.
achievements.summary: Remain topside until the safe window closes and the raid timer expires.

guide.context: The expiration normally eliminates anyone outside the protection of an already active return point, so this attempt risks the entire carried loadout.

steps.text: Deploy with no valuables, avoid extracting, and stay away from a protected active return point until the timer reaches zero and the safe window closes.

achievements.description: Get hit by a Supply Drop.
achievements.summary: Call a @item{Supply Drop} and stand beneath it until the falling crate hits the Raider.

guide.context: Supply Call Stations are thin antennas with yellow-white lights. The flare indicates the crate's landing point, and the impact itself causes no damage.

steps.text: Use the radio at a @loc{Supply Call Station} to launch a flare.
Move directly under the flare's landing point and remain there until the descending Supply Drop strikes the Raider.

achievements.description: Slide 80 meters without stopping.
achievements.summary: Maintain one uninterrupted slide for at least 80 meters on @loc{Dam Battlegrounds}.

guide.context: A smooth dam slope between Pipeline Tower and Control Tower provides enough distance; pinging the bottom verifies an 80-meter line before committing.

steps.text: Stand above a long unobstructed dam face, ping the intended endpoint, and confirm that it is at least 80 meters away.
Sprint toward the slope, begin sliding just before the descent, hold the slide input, and avoid obstacles until passing the ping.

achievements.description: Return to Speranza while leaving a squadmate behind.
achievements.summary: Extract to @loc{Speranza} while at least one current squadmate remains topside.

guide.context: A Raider Hatch works well because one squad member can leave immediately while the others deliberately stay in the raid.

steps.text: Enter a raid in a squad, agree that at least one teammate will remain topside, then extract alone through a return point or Raider Hatch.

achievements.description: Revive an encountered Raider with a Defibrillator.
achievements.summary: Use a @item{Defibrillator} to revive a downed Raider who is not in the squad.

guide.context: A normal held revive is not sufficient for an encountered Raider; the Defibrillator must be equipped from the consumable wheel.

steps.text: Carry a @item{Defibrillator} and approach a downed non-squad Raider before the player is knocked out.
Select the Defibrillator and complete its revive interaction on that Raider.

achievements.description: Reach the top of the Launch Towers in Spaceport.
achievements.summary: Power the central @loc{Launch Tower} on @loc{Spaceport} and ride its zipline to the summit.

guide.context: The required rectangular battery can appear around the tower's exterior ramps, beside small laddered bunkers, or inside rocket thrusters around the launch pad.

steps.text: Find the rectangular battery near the Launch Tower and carry it up the exterior ramp to the generator room below the walkways.
Insert the battery, pull the lever to open the zipline rooms, and ride the newly accessible zipline to the highest platform.

achievements.description: Get gas, stun, and burn statuses at the same time.
achievements.summary: Apply gas, stun, and burn status effects to the Raider at the same time.

guide.context: Use a @item{Jolt Mine} for stun and a @item{Gas Grenade} for gas. Add fire with a @item{Fireball Burner} or @item{Blaze Grenade}; carry a cheap loadout because the combined damage is dangerous.

steps.text: Stand beside a wall in a quiet area and place a Jolt Mine at the Raider's feet.
Throw a Gas Grenade against the wall so the cloud covers the Raider, then immediately ignite the same spot with a Blaze Grenade or Fireball Burner before the earlier statuses expire.

achievements.description: Deal 1000 damage to ARC enemies.
achievements.summary: Deal a cumulative 1,000 damage to @enemy{ARC enemies}.

guide.context: Damage to any ARC class contributes, so ordinary fights against light drones and armored machines complete the threshold naturally.

steps.text: Keep damaging ARC enemies during raids until the tracked total reaches 1,000.

achievements.description: Destroy 50 ARC enemies.
achievements.summary: Destroy 50 @enemy{ARC enemies} across any number of raids.

guide.context: Light drones such as Wasps and Hornets provide quick, low-risk progress compared with armored ARC.

steps.text: Deal the final damage to ARC enemies during normal raids until 50 destructions have registered.

achievements.description: Destroy 100 ARC enemies.
achievements.summary: Destroy 100 @enemy{ARC enemies} across any number of raids.

guide.context: This cumulative milestone continues beyond the 50-ARC achievement and does not require the destructions in one session.

steps.text: Target light drones during travel and finish damaged armored ARC when safe until the destruction total reaches 100.

achievements.description: Deal 50 damage to any enemy while riding a Rocketeer.
achievements.summary: While standing atop a live @enemy{Rocketeer}, deal 50 total damage to any enemy.

guide.context: Rocketeers attempt to shake riders off after roughly 15–20 seconds. A tall western @loc{Buried City} rooftop can provide a direct jump, while a Showstopper or Hornet Driver can temporarily bring one to the ground. Live Update 1.36.0 warns that the game can fail to record gunfire made from atop an ARC machine, so an apparently valid attempt may require another run.

steps.text: Jump from a high roof onto a low-flying Rocketeer, or stun the Rocketeer and climb onto it before it recovers.
Remain on its upper surface and immediately shoot the Rocketeer or another visible enemy until 50 damage has registered.

achievements.description: Destroy a Rocketeer.
achievements.summary: Deal the final damage that destroys a @enemy{Rocketeer}.

guide.context: A Wolfpack grenade or Hullcracker removes armor quickly. With conventional weapons, a building with multiple windows provides cover from missile barrages.

steps.text: Fight from cover and focus fire on the Rocketeer's side thrusters, using explosives or heavy-penetration weapons when available.
Destroy two thrusters so the Rocketeer falls and explodes, and ensure the resulting ARC-destruction credit belongs to the Raider.

achievements.description: Destroy a Bastion.
achievements.summary: Deal the final damage that destroys a @enemy{Bastion}.

guide.context: The yellow leg joints and rear cylinder are its weak points; damaging the joints can disable the machine and expose its core.

steps.text: Use cover against the machine gun and attack the yellow leg joints or rear cylinder with weapons, Wolfpacks, other explosives, or a Hullcracker.
Damage the exposed core during a disable and continue until the Raider receives the final ARC-destruction credit.

achievements.description: Destroy the Queen.
achievements.summary: During a @mechanic{Harvester event}, deal the final damage that destroys the @enemy{Queen}.

guide.context: The event must be active on the map-selection screen. Her blue laser demands solid cover, while fire rockets spread hazardous ground zones; squad damage does not award the unlock unless this Raider lands the final blow.

steps.text: Choose a map with an active Harvester, bring armor-breaking weapons, ample ammunition, healing, and burst damage such as Wolfpack grenades.
Fight from cover, break armor, and damage exposed leg joints or the core until the Queen begins burning and nears destruction.
Have squadmates stop attacking and use reserved burst damage to secure the final ARC-destruction credit.

achievements.description: Destroy a Sentinel with a Raider Tool.
achievements.summary: Destroy a @enemy{Sentinel} using only the @item{Raider Tool} for damage.

guide.context: Sentinels are elevated outdoor turrets. Approaching from behind and staying beside the housing keeps the long barrel from tracking low enough to fire accurately.

steps.text: Locate a Sentinel on a wall or rooftop, approach its rear without shooting it, and move into melee range.
Equip the Raider Tool and keep striking the turret until the melee damage destroys it.

achievements.description: Use 4 different weapons to deal damage in the Practice Range.
achievements.summary: Damage @loc{Practice Range} targets with 4 different weapons during one visit.

guide.context: Each weapon must visibly damage a practice dummy. Live Update 1.36.0 lists the @item{Dolabra}, @item{Hullcracker}, and @item{Rascal} as unable to damage Practice Range dummies, so none of those three can supply a qualifying hit while that issue remains.

steps.text: At the Practice Range, select a weapon other than the Dolabra, Hullcracker, or Rascal, damage a dummy, and swap equipment until four eligible weapons have each scored a visible hit.

achievements.description: Use a Lure Grenade to make a drone attack another drone.
achievements.summary: Stick a @item{Lure Grenade} to one ARC drone and make another drone attack the marked target.

guide.context: A Rocketeer is a large, easy target for nearby Wasps or Hornets. Official patch 1.13.0 corrected the achievement's tracking.

steps.text: Find a Rocketeer with at least one lighter drone nearby and remain undetected long enough to line up the throw.
Stick the Lure Grenade directly to the Rocketeer and wait until a nearby drone fires at the lured Rocketeer.

achievements.description: Shoot a thruster off a Wasp.
achievements.summary: Shoot and break one visible side thruster from a @enemy{Wasp}.

guide.context: Breaking a thruster reduces the drone's mobility; destroying both thrusters usually makes a flying ARC fall and explode.

steps.text: Aim at either side-mounted engine on a flying Wasp and keep firing at that component until it detaches.

achievements.description: Knock out 10 Raiders.
achievements.summary: Fully knock out 10 opposing Raiders across any number of raids.

guide.context: Putting a Raider into the downed state is not the same as a knockout; the opponent must be fully eliminated for credit.

steps.text: Win PvP encounters, then finish each downed opponent before a revive or escape until 10 knockouts have registered.

achievements.description: Get knocked down and finished while inside a return point.
achievements.summary: Be downed and then fully knocked out by another Raider while inside a return point.

guide.context: Allowing only the downed-state timer to expire is unreliable; the cited method requires another player to deliver the finishing knockout within the exit area.

steps.text: Bring no valuables, stand inside an active return point, and use proximity chat or visible surrender to invite an opposing Raider to attack.
Remain inside the return point while the opponent downs and then fully knocks out the Raider.

achievements.description: Down an encountered Raider with a grenade.
achievements.summary: Use grenade damage to put an opposing Raider into the downed state.

guide.context: Trigger, Heavy Fuze, Snap Blast, and Shrapnel grenades provide direct burst damage; enclosed spaces make escape from the blast harder.

steps.text: Damage an opposing Raider without finishing the target, then throw a damaging grenade into the opponent's position.
Ensure the grenade explosion causes the transition into the downed state.

achievements.description: Knock out a Raider.
achievements.summary: Fully knock out one opposing Raider during a raid.

guide.context: A Raider may first enter a recoverable downed state, so the encounter is incomplete until the opponent is eliminated.

steps.text: Down an opposing Raider with weapons or equipment, then deal finishing damage before the opponent is revived or escapes.

achievements.description: Knock out a Raider with a Raider Tool.
achievements.summary: Use the @item{Raider Tool} to fully knock out an opposing Raider.

guide.context: The initial down can come from any source; only the final knockout must be delivered by the basic melee tool.

steps.text: Down an opposing Raider with a weapon, switch to the Raider Tool, approach the incapacitated target, and use melee strikes for the finishing damage.

achievements.displayName: The Friends We Made Along The Way
achievements.description: Return to Speranza together with an encountered Raider.
achievements.summary: Complete the same extraction as a Raider who is not in the squad.

guide.context: The encountered Raider must remain friendly through the return sequence; proximity chat and the communication wheel can establish intent.

steps.text: Approach a non-squad Raider without firing, communicate a request to extract together, and travel to the same return point.
Stay within the departure area with that Raider until both players return safely to Speranza.

achievements.description: Get an encountered Raider downed by ARC enemies summoned with a Snitch Scanner.
achievements.summary: Make ARC reinforcements summoned by a @item{Snitch Scanner} down an opposing Raider.

guide.context: Destroyed Snitches can drop scanners, and several scanners can create multiple reinforcement groups. Official patch 1.13.0 corrected progress tracking.

steps.text: Collect one or more Snitch Scanners, find an opposing Raider in an open area, and damage the target without causing the down.
Throw the scanners close to the target, keep escape routes under pressure, and allow the summoned ARC enemies to deliver the damage that downs the Raider.

achievements.description: Be thanked 10 times in direct response to something you did.
achievements.summary: Receive 10 contextual thank-you responses from other players after helping them.

guide.context: Dropping an item that another player picks up, healing, or reviving creates the direct-response prompt; an unrelated Thanks emote may not count.

steps.text: Help a squadmate or encountered Raider with a prompted action such as giving an item, healing, or reviving.
Have the assisted player use the contextual thank-you response, and continue helping until 10 direct responses have registered.

achievements.description: Visit the Practice Range.
achievements.summary: Complete 4 @loc{Dam Battlegrounds} matches, then enter the @loc{Practice Range} from map selection.

guide.context: The Practice Range is not available immediately; the cited route unlocks it after the fourth Dam Battlegrounds match.

steps.text: Finish four matches on Dam Battlegrounds, return to the map-selection screen, select Practice Range, and load into it once.
